items.name: Beige & Blue Argyle Knit Off-Shoulder Sweater
items.description:
Classic argyle-pattern knit sweater with a soft off-shoulder design and oversized sleeves. Inspired by academic and vintage geek fashion, this piece blends smart patterns with a cozy, feminine silhouette. Timeless, charming, and stylishly nerdy.

🔗 Ora’Bella: https://www.roblox.com/communities/1072106749/OraBella#!/store
